---
title: "AI tools for R programming"
---

```{=html}
<iframe class="slide-deck" src="slides/AI-tools.html"></iframe>
```

[Slides in full screen](slides/AI-tools.html){target="_blank"} | [Download PDF slides](slides_pdf/AI-tools.pdf){download="AI-tools.pdf"}

## Resources

- [ChatGPT](https://chat.openai.com){target="_blank"}, [Claude](https://claude.ai){target="_blank"}, [Gemini](https://gemini.google.com/){target="_blank"}: Browser-based chat bots for general-purpose coding help
- [GitHub Copilot](https://github.com/features/copilot){target="_blank"}: Inline code suggestions (RStudio) and chat (Positron, VS Code)
  - [Step-by-step guide to get Copilot](https://selinazitrone.github.io/tools_and_tips/sessions/additional_material/07_ai_tools/get_copilot_step_by_step.html){target="_blank"} for free with an educational account
  - [GitHub Copilot in RStudio](https://docs.posit.co/ide/user/ide/guide/tools/copilot.html){target="_blank"}: Setup and usage guide
  - [GitHub Copilot Docs](https://docs.github.com/en/copilot){target="_blank"}: Official documentation
- [Claude Code](https://claude.com/solutions/coding){target="_blank"}: AI coding agent that runs in your terminal alongside any IDE
- [Positron](https://positron.posit.co/){target="_blank"}: Data science IDE by Posit with full AI integration
  - [AI in Positron](https://positron.posit.co/assistant.html){target="_blank"}: Setup guide for the Positron Assistant
